titleStmt.title: SII 23.591: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 591. (A.R. No. 591 of 1907.) Nandalūru, Rajampet Taluk, Cuddapah District Saumyanātha temple—on the same wall Jaṭ. Sundara-Pāṇḍya. Year 10

summary.p: The cyclic year Vyaya given against the 10th regnal year of the king seems to point to Jaṭāvarman Sundara-Pāṇḍya II whose accession is known to have taken place in A.D. 1276. This records a mutual agreement between the Mahāsabhā of Nirandanūr and Ulagamuṇḍāṉ-Dāsar one of the Vaishṇava-vāriyam of the temple of Śokkapperumāḷ by which an amount of 200 paṇam deposited with the temple by Piḷḷai Pallavarāyar for the formation of a flower-garden, was invested on 500 kuḻi of land and made over to the Dāsar on condition that he was to supply flower garlands regularly to the temple, himself enjoying the yield of fruits of the different kinds of trees he could plant therein as muṟṟūṭṭu (?)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koṟcaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcuntara pāṇṭiyatevaṟkku yā
ṇṭu 10Āvatu vyaya samvatsarattu Āṭimātattoruṉāḷ Atirācentira maṇṭalattu meṟpākkaināṭ—
ṭu nirantaṉūrāṉa Akarabrahmadeyam śrīkulottuṅkacoḻa caturveti maṅkalattu mahāsabhai
yum śrīkulottuṅka coḻaviṇṇakarem perumāṉ cokkapperumāṉ koyil śrīvai
ṣṇavavāriya mulakamuṇṭāṉ dāsaru mivvaṉaivom śilāśāsanam paṇ ṇiṉapaṭi Iṉṉāyaṉā
r cokkapperumāḷukku piḷḷai pallavarāyar ceyvikkiṟa rāmāṉijaṉ tiruṉaṉtavaṉañ ceyyavuñ ceyyumiṭa
ttu Ittiruṉantavaṉattuḷḷu veḷiyaṭaṅka pala tiruppūmaraṅkaḷumākac cuṟṟile teṅku palā Uḻpaṭṭa palavṛ
kṣaṅkaḷumākki tirumālaikaḷ muṭṭuppaṭāma leṭuttu pontuvaruvatāka dāsar niman=tamāṇṭukku ṅkoṇṭa
colli piḷḷai pallavarāyar varakkāṭṭi kuṭutta paṇam 2 100 Ippaṇa mirunūṟuñ cokkapperumāḷ śrīpaṇṭārattile
kaikkoṇṭu nāccimāṟku tiruvabhiṣekam paṇṇiccāttiṉa drevyat til policaikku cilavākiya cokkapperumāḷ tiru
viṭaiyāṭṭattil Ūṟmeṟku meṭumpaḷḷamuṅ kuḻi Irunūṟṟaimpatu viḻintāṉ kaṭaippūṭṭaiyil kuḻi Irunūṟṟaimpa
tu Āka kuḻi Aiññūṟum I n=ta dāsar niman=tam koṇṭu tāṅkaḷ veṇ ṭiya payir ceytu muṟṟūṭ ṭaṉupavippatāka viṭṭaṉa
�m Ittiru ṉan=tavaṉattil phalavṛkṣaṅkaḷiluḷḷa palaṅkaḷum I tiruṉan=ta vaṉattil rāmāṉujaṉ tiruppūmaṇṭapaceṣamāka viṭṭamai
kku Ippaṭi piḷḷai pallavarāyar dharmam candrātittavarai cellakkaṭavatāka śilāśāsaṉam paṇṇik kuṭutto mivvaṉaivom .
Digital edition of SII 23.591 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
